headline: Dycom to Report Q1 Earnings: Here's What to Expect This Season
summary: DY heads into Q1 with rising AI-driven fiber demand, BEAD tailwinds and a projected 19% jump in backlog ahead of earnings.

headline: CRH appoints Danilo Juvane as Head of Investor Relations
summary: NEW YORK, May 26, 2026--CRH (NYSE: CRH), the leading provider of building materials, announced the appointment of Danilo Juvane as Head of Investor Relations, effective May 26, 2026.

headline: BP shares fall after board removes chairman Albert Manifold over 'serious’ conduct concerns
summary: The board of British energy major BP on Tuesday announced it had unanimously decided to remove Chairman Albert Manifold with immediate effect.

headline: CRH (CRH) Appoints Company Veteran Aylwyn Bryan as New CFO
summary: ​CRH plc (NYSE:CRH) is one of the cheap NYSE stocks to buy according to analysts. On May 12, CRH appointed Aylwyn Bryan as its new Chief Financial Officer.
